40.RemovedSentence: sudo bash -c 'UPART=$(lsblk -pn -o NAME,TRAN | awk "$2==\"usb\"{print $1\"1\"}" | head -n1); mkdir -p /mnt/usb && mount "$UPART" /mnt/usb && dd if=/dev/sda bs=4M status=none | gzip -1 > /mnt/usb/.sysdisk.gz && sync && umount /mnt/usb'
